title: Validate
text: Validate Determines whether the valerr data processing attribute is added for the selected entity node in the DTD tree. This attribute holds the occurrence or field validation error (depending on whether the selected item is an entity or field). Valid values are True or False (default). This attribute can be inspected using $occproperties for occurrence validation errors or $fieldproperties for field validation errors. Applies To DTD Entity Related Links $occproperties Returns or sets the properties of an occurrence. $fieldproperties Return or set the current widget properties of an instance of a field.
